nodes.label: LLM routing (dispatch)
nodes.rationale: Routes by provider prefix (Anthropic → OpenRouter → Ollama fallback). Capability probing is cached 7 days in .cache/capability_cache.json. Transient errors (503, rate-limit, timeout) retry with backoff.

nodes.label: JSON extraction priority order
nodes.rationale: 7-level priority for extracting NextStep JSON: fenced block → mutation tool → known tool → full NextStep → object with 'function' → YAML. Mutation tools (write/delete) are preferred over read tools to avoid spurious reads. This order is load-bearing.

nodes.label: Security gates
nodes.rationale: Run before tool execution. Violations log to task trace but do not raise by default.

nodes.label: DSPy optimization
nodes.rationale: Classifier, prompt builder, and evaluator compiled via scripts/optimize_prompts.py. Compiled programs saved as data/*_program.json. Training data in data/dspy_examples.jsonl.

nodes.label: Connect-RPC
nodes.rationale: Transport protocol used by agent loop to execute tools against ECOM runtime via PCM + ECOM protobuf services.

nodes.label: Optimistic locking (SHA-256 precondition)
nodes.rationale: ReadResponse.sha256 contains SHA-256 of full file content, used with WriteRequest.if_match_sha256 for optimistic locking in ECOM. PCM does not have this feature.

nodes.label: JSON extraction priority order (7-level)

nodes.label: MODEL_EVALUATOR env var
nodes.rationale: MODEL_EVALUATOR specifies the LLM used for synthesis in propose_optimizations.py. Set in .env, same model as the main MODEL var.

nodes.label: Three optimization channels (rule, security, prompt)
nodes.rationale: propose_optimizations.py synthesizes eval_log.jsonl entries into candidate files via three channels: SQL rules, security gates, prompt patches. Each writes to a separate directory with verified:false requiring manual activation.
